published_prior_art.cite: RambachanRoth2023 + AndrewsRothPakes2023: fixed-M Honest-DiD test uses linear conditional moment-inequality inference

repo_prior_art.cite: Q1_SpectralThreshold and q1_spectral_phase_transition are Markov/FWL sign or row-space phase results, not Honest-DiD fixed-M CI paths; pid_did_anticipation_bounded is independent anticipation boxes

published_prior_art.cite: Multiparametric programming literature: active-set critical regions with piecewise affine/quadratic value functions; RambachanRoth2023 supplies fixed-M Honest-DiD plots
AndrewsRothPakes2023 on slack-moment-insensitive fixed-system inference; KaidoMolinariStoye2022 on constraint qualifications in partial identification

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses the multiparametric LP/QP critical-region literature, which already gives finite active-set partitions and piecewise affine/quadratic value maps; tier=field below novelty_target=flagship unless the Honest-DiD inference content is strengthened beyond this standard geometry.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses Kaido-Molinari-Stoye 2022 on constraint qualifications in partial identification, the closest published comparison for LICQ/tie regularity.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed canonical system is bare feasibility; zero inclusion in an RR/ARP confidence set also needs the test statistic, critical value, and slack/conditioning convention.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposed partition writes m_K <= infinity; to cover all M >= 0 it must require m_K = infinity or explicitly add a terminal ray.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The object c_{1-alpha}^{RR}(F_1,J_1,...,F_q,J_q) and the tied quotient problem are not defined in the setup.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a related-work paragraph on multiparametric LP/QP critical regions and state precisely what the RR conditional critical value and zero-null nuisance equality add beyond standard active-set geometry.
Upgrade the flagship claim from a face diagram to a valid estimator/inference theorem for the breakdown value M_star, including regular and tied crossings.
Patch Theorem 1 so the canonical rows carry the RR/ARP test statistic and fixed-M critical-value rule, not only the null feasibility inequalities.

recommended_next_step: Revise rather than pivot: repair the fixed-M test formulation, add the missed optimization/CQ prior art, and strengthen the contribution to breakdown-value inference if the target remains flagship.
